findings.description: The `thread-context-initialization` section is well over 2000 characters and contains a source h3 heading `ユーザIDを設定する` (underlined with `^^`) that is folded into the same section rather than split into a separate section entry.
findings.source_evidence: RST source has `.. _thread_context_handler-user_id_attribute_setting:` / `ユーザIDを設定する` / `^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^` as a distinct h3 subsection under the h2 initialization section.

findings.description: Missing hint `SessionUtil` — the class appears in two code examples (`SessionUtil.put(context, "user.id", userId)` and `SessionUtil.orNull(ctx, "userContext")`) and is an API a user might search for in this context.
findings.source_evidence: Source code examples: `SessionUtil.put(context, "user.id", userId);` and `LoginUserPrincipal userContext = SessionUtil.orNull(ctx, "userContext");`

findings.description: Missing hint `I18nHandler` in both the language-selection and timezone-selection sections. The class name is the concrete handler implementation shown as the primary example in both sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source code examples in both sections: `public class I18nHandler implements HttpRequestHandler { ... }`
